caption:
uicradio April 8, 2025: "Last Saturday we held our Spring 2025 retreat!🌼 We bonded through activities such as “Draw Your Home” and “True Colors”🪺 Then finished strong with some JackBox games!🧚

Thank you to our general members who came, we had a great time and hope you all did too! 

Keep an eye out on our YouTube for exclusive footage from the retreat👀".

caption:
uicradio February 17, 2025: "We are so excited to announce BATTLE OF THE BANDS 2025 coming April 30th! 🐬
We can’t wait to share more details, but for now, application are NOW OPEN! We are looking for bands and comedy acts. Auditions will close March 17th. 🎵

At least 50% of band members must be UIC students. All comedy acts must be UIC students. The winning musical act will open for Spark 2025 🥁 and the winning comedy act will serve as the Spark emcee. 🎤

Link: go.uic.edu/botb2025".

caption:
"✨ Get Fired Up for UIC Homecoming 2024! ✨ 

Join us November 8-15 as we Roar into the ‘20s with Sparky! 🕺✨ Enjoy the week packed with Flames spirit, from tailgates and basketball to window painting, DJ battle, and our grand Homecoming Dance at the Chicago History Museum! 🏀 🎶 

📅 Don’t miss out - follow us for event updates and tag your memories with #UICHOCO! Let’s make this a Homecoming for the books! ❤️💙

For more details, visit: go.uic.edu/HOCO or visit the link in our bio!".

📅 Don’t miss out - follow us for event updates and tag your memories with #UICHOCO! Let’s make this a Homecoming for the books! ❤️💙

caption:
"🔥 Passionate about making a difference on campus? Now’s your chance to lead! We’re looking for dedicated student leaders to join  UIC Radio! 💼✨

UIC Radio open positions are: 
Station Manager
Program Director
Blog Director
Brand Director
Engagement Director
Production Assistant
Assistant Program Director 
Assistant Blog Director 
Assistant Brand Director 

📅 Apply between October 21st - November 1st at go.uic.edu/CSIStudentLeader

Bring your energy and make an impact at UIC! Reach out with questions/concerns!".

caption:
uiccsi September 5, 2024: "We’re thrilled to announce the 2024 SPARK acts: headliner J.I.D. and EARTHGANG 🔥 along with DJ Moneyca and Earl Hester and the Nasty Boyz ‼️‼️

📅 Saturday, September 14, 2024
⏰ Doors open at 5PM, gates close at 7:30PM sharp
📍 Harrison Field (corner of Harrison/Halsted St)

This event is exclusively for UIC students, staff/faculty, and alumni. UIC students are allowed one guest per i-card. For more info, visit go.uic.edu/SPARK. Please check slide 2 for the full list of prohibited items; attendees found with these items won’t be let into the venue.

#UIC #SPARK2024 #thisisUIC #uicbound".

caption:
uicradio April 13, 2024: "We are so excited to finally announce the official lineup for this year’s BATTLE OF THE BANDS‼️ With just under two weeks to go, these bands have been working hard to earn their place at next year’s SPARK… be there on April 24 to support your favorite in the crowd!

caption:
"The UIC School of Theater & Music and UIC Radio are hosting their first “Batalla de las Bandas” event on March 29, 2024 at the Rehearsal Hall, in the ETMSW Building at UIC.

UIC student bands and solo acts are encouraged to perform a range of genres from cumbia, salsa, merengue, reggaeton, banda/regional, and Latin Rock to win a slot at the Latin American Music Festival Block Party. Click the link in bio to submit your audition. #uiclamf".

caption:
uicradio March 1, 2024: "We’re so excited to announce BATTLE OF THE BANDS 2024—reimagined—coming this April! We can’t wait to share more details, but applications for UIC bands and artists to compete for a spot on the SPARK lineup are open now! 🎸⚔️

And for the first time this year, UIC comedians can apply through the same form to enter and compete for the MC role at SPARK! 

Bands must have a minimum of 2 current UIC students to qualify. Solo artists can apply to compete as well!

Who’s excited for the showdown? Comment with #botb2024 if you are ‼️🏵️".
caption_raw:
uicradio March 1, 2024: "We’re so excited to announce BATTLE OF THE BANDS 2024—reimagined—coming this April! We can’t wait to share more details, but applications for UIC bands and artists to compete for a spot on the SPARK lineup are open now! 🎸⚔️

And for the first time this year, UIC comedians can apply through the same form to enter and compete for the MC role at SPARK! 

Bands must have a minimum of 2 current UIC students to qualify. Solo artists can apply to compete as well!

Who’s excited for the showdown? Comment with #botb2024 if you are ‼️🏵️".

caption: uicradio February 23, 2024: "The 24-HOUR SHOW begins today! Who’s ready? Tune in for all of the amazing shows we’ve got lined up, and make sure to check out all of our giveaways too! Only on uicradio.net or Radio FX! #uicradio24 ⏳🪩✨".
caption_raw: uicradio February 23, 2024: "The 24-HOUR SHOW begins today! Who’s ready? Tune in for all of the amazing shows we’ve got lined up, and make sure to check out all of our giveaways too! Only on uicradio.net or Radio FX! #uicradio24 ⏳🪩✨".

caption:
uicradio February 21, 2024: "In honor of our birthday just passing and our 24 HOUR SHOW coming up… we’ll be having special giveaways 🎁! [open to all] 
Tune in to every hour to win tickets to each of these incredible events🤩
To enter, follow @uicradio and either @uiccsi / @lh_schubas / @metrochicago / @hobchicago / @cobralounge then, once you hear the special code word during the show, send us a DM with the word and we’ll select you live on air! 
The program will be released this Thursday, sooo stay on the lookout for more details on our shows 👀. 
The 24 HRS start this Friday at 10am thru Saturday 10am! Are you ready🥳??".
caption_raw:
uicradio February 21, 2024: "In honor of our birthday just passing and our 24 HOUR SHOW coming up… we’ll be having special giveaways 🎁! [open to all] 
Tune in to every hour to win tickets to each of these incredible events🤩
To enter, follow @uicradio and either @uiccsi / @lh_schubas / @metrochicago / @hobchicago / @cobralounge then, once you hear the special code word during the show, send us a DM with the word and we’ll select you live on air! 
The program will be released this Thursday, sooo stay on the lookout for more details on our shows 👀. 
The 24 HRS start this Friday at 10am thru Saturday 10am! Are you ready🥳??".

caption:
uicradio February 19, 2024: "This weekend, join us for UIC Radio’s biggest on-air event of the year. 

Starting at 10 a.m. this Friday and ending exactly 24 hours later on the 24th, we’ll be live on-air uninterrupted with special sets, talk shows, late-night giveaways, and more to celebrate 24 years of UIC Radio! 

Stay tuned for our detailed schedule and a complete list of giveaways! Tune in on uicradio.net or the Radio FX app ✨🔥 #uicradio24".

caption: uicradio February 8, 2024: "24 years ago today, UIC Radio was born! Here’s to 24 more years of music and culture! We can’t wait to SHOW you what’s next for our station! 💙".

caption: uicradio January 30, 2024: "UIC Radio applications for Spring ‘24 are live now! Join us as a DJ, podcaster, and/or blogger and become part of UIC’s media community—forms will be open for two weeks ‼️🔥".
